title: Form to add client cant add account in form
excerpt:
Hi i want to create a form for adding a new contact. The form doesnt let me select an account to add a contact to. This seems like a pretty big miss to not be able to add a contact to an account? 
Requires a secondary ap…

posts.author: jpelrman87 (Josh Perlman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi i want to create a form for adding a new contact. The form doesnt let me select an account to add a contact to. This seems like a pretty big miss to not be able to add a contact to an account?

Requires a secondary app it seems like which gets super pricey…

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jpelrman87

What do you mean by account, are you referring to a Connected Board of Accounts?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
If it’s a connected column, then you’ll be able to choose it. Is your form setting for internal use only? If it’s set for external use, then an admin will need to activate a setting since there is a possibility of sharing data with non users.

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: jpelrman87 (Josh Perlman)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s for internal use how do we use it? It’s a connected column/mirror column situation how do we use it?
I want the mirror column to be used as its account to a contact at an account so the connect column is the account and then it mirror the user.

Josh Perlman
josh@betrshows.com

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: If you have a ‘connected’ column on the board, you should just see it as an option on the form. can you screenshot what error you’re getting?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I realize, I think this is a setting you have to turn on the ‘monday labs’

image822×489 30.2 KB

This is what the ‘connected’ column looks like in the form settings.
